'''''Nightfall''''' was a [[Sith Destroyer]] in the fleet of the [[New Sith]] Empire, which served as [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Skere Kaan|Kaan's]] [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] in the final years of the [[New Sith Wars]].

==Characteristics==
The Destroyer contained a [[Meditation chamber/Legends|meditation sphere]] from which Kaan could direct fleet operations with [[Battle meditation/Legends|battle meditation]]. Its bridge crew had all been hand-selected by Kaan and were absolutely loyal to him. [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Adrianna Nyras]] was its military commander.

==History==
''Nightfall'' led the Sith fleet, striking from [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], which captured [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]] from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] in the [[First Battle of Ruusan]] in [[1002 BBY]].

At some point, it departed that world to lead the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Coreward]] advance of the Sith fleet in a campaign which saw the conquest of the [[Bormea sector/Legends|Bormea sector]], including [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]], [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]], and [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal IV]], as well as the key intersection of the [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]] and the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]].

''Nightfall'', with Kaan, was thus absent when the Jedi [[Army of Light/Legends|Army of Light]] led by [[Hoth (Jedi Lord)|Lord Hoth]] retook Ruusan in the [[Third Battle of Ruusan]]. Alerted at Brentaal by Lord [[Kopecz]], Kaan abandoned his plans for a push towards [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] itself and returned to Ruusan.

==Appearances==
*''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' {{Ab|Darth Bane: Path of Destruction (audiobook)}}
